expertise.title: Education
expertise.description: Passionate about teaching and creating engaging learning experiences that make complex biological concepts accessible.

expertise.title: Research & Laboratory
expertise.description: Hands-on experience in laboratory management, sample analysis, and scientific research with attention to quality control.

expertise.title: Data Management
expertise.description: Skilled in organizing, cleaning, and managing data with precision. Experienced in administrative support and documentation.

expertise.title: Web Development

projects.title: Interactive Biology Learning Module
projects.description: An interactive e-learning platform for biology students featuring quizzes, simulations, and progress tracking.

details.overview: Designed and developed an interactive e-learning platform aimed at biology students. The platform features adaptive quizzes, visual simulations of biological processes, and a comprehensive progress tracking system that helps students identify areas for improvement.
details.challenge: Traditional biology learning materials were static and unengaging. Students struggled to visualize complex biological processes like cell division, photosynthesis, and DNA replication.
details.solution: Built an interactive web application with animated simulations that break down complex processes into digestible steps. Added adaptive quizzes that adjust difficulty based on student performance.
results: Improved student engagement by 40% compared to traditional materials
Quiz completion rate increased from 60% to 95%
Students reported better understanding of complex biological concepts

projects.title: Microbiology Lab Report System
projects.description: Digital system for recording and managing microbiology laboratory results with automated analysis.

details.overview: Developed a digital laboratory report system for microbiology research. The system streamlines the process of recording sample data, performing automated analysis, and generating comprehensive research reports.
details.challenge: Laboratory reports were handwritten, prone to errors, and difficult to organize. Searching for historical data was time-consuming and inefficient.
details.solution: Created a structured digital system with standardized input forms, automated calculations, and searchable database. Reports can be generated in multiple formats with consistent formatting.
results: Eliminated handwriting errors in data recording
Enabled instant search across 500+ historical records

projects.title: Student Performance Dashboard
projects.description: Excel-based dashboard for tracking and analyzing student academic performance across multiple metrics.

details.overview: Created a comprehensive Excel-based dashboard for tracking and analyzing student academic performance. The dashboard aggregates data from multiple sources and presents insights through interactive charts and summary tables.
details.challenge: Student performance data was scattered across multiple spreadsheets with inconsistent formatting. Teachers had no centralized view of student progress.
details.solution: Built a unified dashboard with automated data import, cleaning routines, and dynamic visualizations. Teachers can filter by class, subject, semester, and individual student.
results: Centralized data from 15+ separate spreadsheets into one dashboard
Reduced data processing time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
Enabled early identification of at-risk students

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern, responsive portfolio website built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

details.overview: Designed and developed a modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing multidisciplinary expertise in biology, research, data management, and web development. Built with performance and accessibility as top priorities.
details.challenge: Needed a professional online presence that could effectively communicate expertise across multiple disciplines while maintaining a clean, modern aesthetic.
details.solution: Built with Next.js App Router for optimal performance, Tailwind CSS for responsive design, and Framer Motion for smooth animations. Content is separated into JSON files for easy editing.
results: Achieved 95+ Lighthouse score across all metrics
Dark mode support with system preference detection

projects.title: Scientific Writing Workshop Materials
projects.description: Comprehensive teaching materials for scientific writing workshops targeting undergraduate students.

details.overview: Developed a complete set of teaching materials for a scientific writing workshop aimed at undergraduate biology students. Covers everything from literature review to manuscript preparation.
details.challenge: Undergraduate students lacked structured guidance on scientific writing. Existing resources were too advanced or not tailored to biology disciplines.
details.solution: Created a step-by-step curriculum with practical exercises, templates, checklists, and real-world examples from biology research papers.
results: Workshop attended by 100+ students across 3 sessions
Student paper submission rate increased by 35%

projects.title: Sample Tracking Application
projects.description: Web-based application for tracking laboratory samples from collection to analysis with status updates.

details.overview: Built a web-based sample tracking application that manages laboratory samples throughout their lifecycle — from collection and labeling to analysis and result reporting.
details.challenge: Samples were tracked manually using paper logs, leading to misplacement, duplicate entries, and delayed processing times.
details.solution: Developed a web application with barcode-style ID generation, real-time status tracking, and automated notifications for pending samples.
